toc.value: The "Direct Connect" Pattern: Tencent Cloud CAM

frontMatter.title: A Tale of Two Clouds - AWS RDS Proxy vs. Tencent Cloud CAM
frontMatter.summary: A quick look at database security architectures, contrasting the middleware pattern of AWS RDS Proxy with the client-side approach of Tencent Cloud CAM.

authorDetails.name: Ted
authorDetails.occupation: CISSP, CKS, AWS Certified Security – Specialty, Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect Expert

prev.summary: Stop using hard-coded tokens like it's 2007: A deep dive into securing microservices with OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials and the magic of JWKS key rotation.
